refined_caption: The hospital food tray contains a tray of food and utensils that appear unappetizing. The presentation of the food is uninviting.
complaint_description: I was disappointed with the food served to me during my stay at the hospital. The food on my tray looked unappetizing and I did not feel like eating it. This experience was unpleasant and I hope the hospital can improve their food quality.
voice_text: The food they're serving here looks really gross, I don't want to eat it.
